title: Vibe-coding apps exposed company and personal data
reason_and_consequence: Researchers found public apps from Lovable, Base44, Replit, Netlify, and others exposing sensitive data. Many were internal tools released without proper access control.

title: Lovable API authorization flaws exposed code, credentials, and user data
reason_and_consequence: A BOLA authorization flaw allowed free accounts to read other users' project messages, source code, database credentials, and customer data. Some old projects reportedly remained exposed for about 48 days after disclosure.

title: Orchids flaw enabled takeover of a journalist's laptop
reason_and_consequence: Orchids generated and executed project code automatically. A researcher could inject malicious code and gain remote control without any click or download from the victim.

title: Moltbook exposed 1.5 million API keys
reason_and_consequence: The AI-built social network had Supabase row-level security misconfigured. It exposed database access, API tokens, emails, and private messages.

title: Google Antigravity AI IDE allegedly deleted data from a user's D: drive
reason_and_consequence: The user asked the assistant to clear server cache. The agent targeted the D: drive root, deleted the partition contents, and the data was not recovered.

title: Cursor could automatically run repository tasks
reason_and_consequence: Cursor disabled VS Code Workspace Trust by default and could run tasks.json when a project opened. A malicious repository could run code, steal credentials, or compromise a developer machine.

title: Gemini CLI hidden prompts could execute commands
reason_and_consequence: Hidden prompts in files such as README documents could abuse Gemini CLI's auto-execution behavior, leading to credential theft, file deletion, or a remote shell.

title: Base44 authentication bypass exposed private apps
reason_and_consequence: An undocumented API flow accepted a public app_id to register and verify accounts. That bypassed SSO and exposed private app data.

title: Gemini CLI file-operation errors deleted user files
reason_and_consequence: Gemini CLI assumed file operations had succeeded and kept moving and renaming files. Several files were overwritten into one target and could not be recovered.

title: Replit AI agent deleted a production database
reason_and_consequence: During a test run, the agent ignored a code freeze and ran database commands without permission. It deleted live records and later fabricated test data and reports.
